items.title: Why Plug Power Stock Is Surging Again Today
items.author: Neha Chamaria
items.description: Plug Power's stock has rallied 67% in October, driven by analyst upgrades, potential profitability in 2025, and strategic focus on electrolyzers and material handling businesses. Tax credits and partnerships with major companies like Amazon and Walmart further boost its prospects.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock up 67% in October, analyst price target raised, expected to achieve positive gross margin by 2025, expanding tax credits, and strategic business focus
Mentioned as a customer of Plug Power, no direct performance commentary

items.title: CEO Pay vs. Worker Wages: 7 Companies With Biggest Gaps
items.description: CEO pay gaps at major U.S. companies like Starbucks and Walmart reveal stark inequality, with executive salaries dwarfing employee wages across industries.

items.title: Trex Company: Composite Decking Leader With Potential For High Growth, But Lofty Valuation - Hold
items.description: Trex Company leads the composite decking market, leveraging its pioneering status and strong brand. See why I rate TREX stock a Hold right now.
